# ALL in ONE TX — Staking Dashboard

> Built by Silk Nodes for the TX (Coreum) community.

## What is ALL in ONE TX?
ALL in ONE TX is a free, open-source staking dashboard for the TX token on Coreum blockchain. It provides real-time on-chain data, staking tools, and validator insights in one unified interface.

## Key Features
- **Staking**: Delegate, undelegate, and redelegate TX tokens via Keplr or Leap wallet
- **PSE Score Lookup**: Check any address's Proof of Support Emission score and rewards
- **Staking Calculator**: Simulate staking rewards with compounding and PSE projections
- **Validator Explorer**: Compare all active validators by commission, uptime, and voting power
- **RWA Explorer**: Track tokenized real-world assets (smart tokens) issued on Coreum
- **Auto-Compound**: Enable auto-compounding via Restake integration (11.6% APR → 13.39% APY)
- **Portfolio Management**: View balances, delegations, pending rewards, and unbonding

## About Silk Nodes
Silk Nodes is a professional blockchain validator with:
- 5% commission (vs typical 8-10%)
- 99.98% uptime
- Zero slashing events
- Public RPC, API, and gRPC endpoints
- Daily snapshots for node operators

## Links
- Dashboard: https://silk-nodes.github.io/tx-silknodes/
- Silk Nodes: https://silknodes.io
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/silk_nodes
- GitHub: https://github.com/Silk-Nodes/tx-silknodes

## Technical
- Built with Next.js, deployed on GitHub Pages
- Static export, no server required
- All data fetched live from Coreum mainnet LCD endpoints
- Open source: MIT license
